message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Sozialistische Lebensweise 1988 – Beschäftigung und Arbeitsbedingungen in der DDR","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4875","justification":"Survey from the late 1980s in the GDR with detailed information on employment situations, working conditions, and labor relations, directly relevant to employment in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialindikatorenerhebung DDR 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4874","justification":"GDR social indicators survey from 1986 including variables on occupation, employment status, sector, and working conditions, covering employment structures in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4880","justification":"Dataset on work and living conditions in the GDR around 1984, with a strong focus on employment, workplace characteristics, and job satisfaction in the 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialstruktur und soziale Mobilität in der DDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4885","justification":"Study on social structure and mobility in the GDR, early 1980s; includes data on occupations, sectors of employment, and career trajectories, which reflect employment patterns during the 1980s."},{"title":"Frauen in der DDR: Berufstätigkeit und Familie 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4890","justification":"Focuses on women’s employment and family life in the GDR in the early 1980s, providing detailed information on labor force participation, occupational positions, and working hours."},{"title":"Jugend und Arbeit in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4895","justification":"Study of young people and work in the GDR, mid‑1980s; examines vocational training, employment entry, occupational choices, and early career employment conditions."},{"title":"Industriearbeit in der DDR 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4900","justification":"Dataset on industrial labor in the GDR at the beginning of the 1980s, covering employment in state-owned enterprises, work organization, and industrial working conditions."},{"title":"Arbeitszufriedenheit und Betriebsklima in der DDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4905","justification":"Survey on job satisfaction and workplace climate in the GDR in 1987, with variables on employment status, occupation, sector, and perceptions of work and management."},{"title":"Berufliche Bildung und Beschäftigung in der DDR 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4910","justification":"Study on vocational education and subsequent employment in the GDR at the start of the 1980s, linking training pathways with labor‑market positions and employment sectors."},{"title":"Sozialpolitik und Arbeit in der DDR 1989","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4915","justification":"Late‑1980s dataset on social policy and work in the GDR, covering employment security, benefits tied to employment, and workers’ assessments of labor and social conditions shortly before reunification."}]}
